pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Otto 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are delighted to bring you the Be@rbrick Otto 400% Collectible Figure!  First appearing in Despicable Me and quickly becoming a fan favorite for his adorably chubby frame and spectacled face, this beloved Minion stands at a perfect 11.02 inches. With a pet rock peeking out of his overalls, who could resist this little guy?  Add Otto to your Minions collection today!
